name: zephus
description: Local WYSIWYG website editor for Astro sites

scripts.clean: node build-scripts/dist-tools.js clean && node build-scripts/dist-tools.js clean-release
scripts.compile: node build-scripts/dist-tools.js clean && npm run compile:main && npm run generate:theme-previews && npm run compile:renderer && npm run licenses && node build-scripts/dist-tools.js copy
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:main && npm run typecheck:renderer
scripts.b: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C beta origin/beta && git reset --hard origin/beta && git clean -fd && npm run vi
scripts.r: git fetch origin && git reset --hard && git clean -fd && git switch -C main origin/main && git reset --hard origin/main && git clean -fd && npm run vi && npm run gitprune:force
scripts.u: npm update && npm run release:prepare && npm run format && npm run test:all
scripts.start: npm run clean && npm run compile && electron .
scripts.dev: npm run compile && cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron . --dev
scripts.build:win:all: npm run build:win && npm run build:win:x64 && npm run build:win:arm64
scripts.build:mac:universal: npm run prebuild:mac:universal && dotenv -e .env -- electron-builder -c electron-builder.base.yml --mac --universal
scripts.build:linux: npm run prebuild:linux && electron-builder -c electron-builder.base.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --arm64
scripts.build:linux:x64: npm run prebuild:linux && electron-builder -c electron-builder.base.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64
scripts.build:linux:arm64: npm run prebuild:linux && electron-builder -c electron-builder.base.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --arm64
scripts.build:linux:all: npm run build:linux:x64 && npm run build:linux:arm64
scripts.build:github: npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --win --arm64 --x64
scripts.build:github:win: npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --win --arm64 --x64
scripts.build:github:mac: npm run prebuild:mac:universal && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --mac --universal
scripts.build:msstore:x64: npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=msstore electron-builder --win --x64 -c electron-builder.msstore.yml
scripts.build:msstore:arm64: npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=msstore electron-builder --win --arm64 -c electron-builder.msstore.yml
scripts.build:msstore: npm run build:msstore:x64 && npm run build:msstore:arm64
scripts.release:prepare:publish: npm run release:prepare && dotenv -e .env -- node build-scripts/create-gh-draft.js
scripts.release:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --win --arm64 --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:win:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --win --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:win:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --win --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:mac:universal && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --mac --universal --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:mac
scripts.release:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:x64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:linux:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:arm64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:all: npm run release:mac && npm run release:win && npm run release:linux
scripts.release:beta:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --win --arm64 --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:win:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --win --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:win:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --win --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:mac: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:mac:universal && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --mac --universal --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:beta:mac
scripts.release:beta:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:linux:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:x64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:linux:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.beta.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:arm64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:beta:all: npm run release:beta:mac && npm run release:beta:win && npm run release:beta:linux
scripts.release:db:win: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --win --arm64 --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:win:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --win --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:win:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:win && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --win --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:mac: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:mac:universal && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --mac --universal --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:mac:ssh: npm run mac:ssh:keychain && npm run release:db:mac
scripts.release:db:linux: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:linux:x64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --x64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:x64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:linux:arm64: npm run release:prepare && npm run prebuild:linux && dotenv -e .env -- cross-env CHANNEL=github electron-builder -c electron-builder.github.db.yml --linux AppImage deb rpm --arm64 --publish always && npm run sign:gpg:arm64 && npm run release:finalize
scripts.release:db:all: npm run release:db:mac && npm run release:db:win && npm run release:db:linux
scripts.setup:deb: sudo apt update && sudo apt install -y build-essential libgtk-3-dev libnotify-dev libnss3-dev libxss-dev libxtst-dev libatspi2.0-dev uuid-dev libsecret-1-dev libx11-dev rpm flatpak flatpak-builder && sudo flatpak remote-add --if-not-exists flathub https://flathub.org/repo/flathub.flatpakrepo

author: BurntToasters <code@rosie.run>
